name: Secondary Folder Tree
description: A second folder tree, slid in from the right of TEDI's workspace and mutual-exclusive with the AI Agent sidebar. Renders the current workspace folder; expand subdirectories on click, double-click a file to emit an `open-path` event. Built on TEDI's generic right-panel hook (`registerPanelRenderer`) — drops in next to the AI Agent button without core changes.
author: IlhamRiski - ilhamriski.com
